_readme: Endeavor Air First Officer minimums, from the Job Qualifications table on the airlineapps.com posting (pasted by Hans 2026-07-11). Edit if Endeavor republishes updated numbers.
program: Endeavor Air First Officer (Delta Propel pathway)

total_time.note: 750 hrs applies via the military-trained-and-qualified R-ATP pathway. Standard is 1500 hrs; 1250 hrs with an aviation associate's degree; 1000 hrs with an aviation bachelor's degree.

night.note: Not broken out by category on the posting — tracked as airplane + rotor combined.

instrument.note: Tracked as Actual + Simulated Instrument combined, airplane + rotor.

cross_country.note: Reducible to 200 hrs, but under 500 a Restricted ATP is issued instead of a full ATP.

pic.note: May combine SIC time if that SIC was acquired in operations that required a SIC under FAR. Shown here as both strict PIC and PIC+qualifying-SIC — confirm with Propel/your recruiter whether your military SIC time qualifies before relying on the combined number.
